name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M11746 White] Delicate perforations depict the Monogram pattern on soft perforated calfskin, echoing the elegant Iris wallet. A gentle curved flap conceals spacious compartments, a zip coin pocket, and multiple card slots. Exquisite details include engraved buttons. 19 x 12 x 2 cm (L x H x W) C
